name: Birch Grove Community Tennis Court
description: Birch Grove Community Tennis Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tofte, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Birch Grove School
description: Come play pickleball at Birch Grove School in Tofte, MN! There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cook County Tennis Association
description: Come play pickleball at Cook County Tennis Association in Grand Marais, MN! There are 9 acrylic and wood courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Available other times when no scheduled event

name: Cook County YMCA
description: Cook County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Marais, MN. There are 4 hard and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.
